seo.title: Private Events and Venue Buyouts in Mission Beach | Miss B's Coconut Club
seo.description: Host your private event at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Birthday parties, corporate events, bachelorette parties, and full venue buyouts at 3704 Mission Blvd.

hero.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club private events outdoor patio Mission Beach San Diego
hero.eyebrow: Mission Beach's Premier Outdoor Event Venue
hero.heading: Private Events
hero.subheading: The only open-air bar venue on Mission Blvd. Steps from the Pacific. Available for buyouts, parties, and corporate events of all sizes.

why.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club private event space Mission Beach San Diego
why.heading:
A Venue Worth
Showing Off
body: Miss B's Coconut Club is not a banquet room. It's a genuinely memorable space — the open-air teal bar, the copper flamingo taps, the tropical dining room, the patio with pink fringed umbrellas. Your guests will be talking about the venue before they even get to the food.
Our events team handles every detail from first inquiry to last call. Custom menus, cocktail packages, room configuration, and dedicated staff throughout your event.

inquiry.heading: Submit an Inquiry
inquiry.body: Tell us your date, headcount, and event type. Our team responds within 24 hours with availability and a custom proposal.

detail.splitHeading:
Everything You Need
for a Perfect Event
detail.includedBody: Our events team takes care of every detail so you can focus on your guests.
detail.inquiryBody: Tell us your date, headcount, and any details. Our team responds within 24 hours with availability and a custom proposal.
